query: Check the SonarCloud quality gate status for our latest PR — I want to see if there are any blockers before we can merge, especially around security vulnerabilities and code coverage
Pull the SonarCloud analysis results for our project — show me all the critical and major security vulnerabilities found in the last scan, with file locations and remediation guidance
We're in /review and SonarCloud flagged some issues — get the full list of code smells, bugs, and vulnerabilities from the latest analysis so I can address them before the quality gate passes
What's our current technical debt ratio in SonarCloud? Show me the metrics dashboard — maintainability rating, reliability rating, security rating, and coverage percentage
The SonarCloud quality gate is failing on our PR — pull the specific issues that are blocking it and show me what needs to be fixed, sorted by severity
Get the SonarCloud code coverage report for our project — I want to see which modules have low coverage and identify the files that need more tests before our next release
Implement a new REST API endpoint for user profile management with CRUD operations, input validation, and proper error handling
Search for best practices around implementing OAuth2 PKCE flow in a Node.js application
Write a comprehensive market analysis of the DevSecOps tools landscape covering SAST, DAST, and SCA vendors
Scrape https://docs.sonarcloud.io and extract the full list of supported languages and analysis rules
Build a structured company profile for SonarSource — return JSON with founding year, funding, products, and competitive positioning
Add proper citations to docs/research/security-audit-findings.md following our project's citation standards
